top_findings.summary: The skill description shows it requests "Bash(cmd:*)" which provides unrestricted access to execute any system command through the Bash shell. This is excessive for a KPI definition helper skill whose stated purpose is providing guidance, generating configurations, and following best practices for data analytics. While some file operations (Read/Write/Edit) may be reasonable for generating code/configurations, unrestricted command execution poses significant security risks and could allow actions far beyond the skill's stated purpose of providing guidance and generating configurations.
